settings.title: Qindaa'ina
settings.subtitle: Akka mul'atan, ergaa siif dhufu, fi galma walitti qixa ta'u akka ta'u sirreessi — repii sochii keessatti jiranif.
settings.identityDesc: Maqaa keessan gabatee fi dirqama irratti akkamitti mul'atu.
settings.currencyHint: Daashboordii, deeskii gurgurtaa, challenges, fi walitti isaaniif mallattoo kana fayyadama. Waliin ibsa kee olkaa'ama.
settings.notificationsDesc: Hubannoo qabaadhaa osoo bu'aa hin ta'in.
settings.notifSalesDesc: Injifannoo, galmeewwan, fi ergaa pipeline kee waliin.
settings.notifChallengesDesc: Yeroo seenaa challenges hordofattan jijjiiramu si beeksisa.
settings.notifDigestDesc: Cuunfaa tokko tasgabbaa — imeelii baay'ee miti.
settings.commandConsoleIntro: Namoota dhaabbata, mallattolee industrii, fi hojii — meeshaaleen duraanis fakkaatan amma asitti jiru.
settings.fieldAlignmentDesc: Galma fi sarara oomishaa Quick Add fi deeskii gurgurtaa ni jajjabeessu — maqaa qulqulluu taasisi akka ripoortiin amanamuuf.
settings.fieldAlignmentBody: Kaardii galma kee olitti argamu waliin gurgurta galmeessame bira jiru wal qixa — hamma torbanii fi ji'a tokkoo.
settings.targetAssignmentsDesc: Namoota si barbaadanif galma murteessi ykn sirreessi.
settings.noTargetsYet: Amma ammoo galma hin jiru — lakkoofsa gareen hordofuuf tokko uumi.
settings.personLockedHint: Nama fi dandeettii asitti walitti hin jijjiiramu — guyyaawwan, yeroo, ykn hanga sirreessi.
settings.amountStoredHint: Akka walitti makama USD (1 USD = {rate} ETB) olkaa'ama.
settings.deleteTargetConfirm: Galma kana haquu? Daashboordiin kee walitti makama itti aanu fayyadama.
